Monadfluence MONAD is a bot-first AI influencer backend.

Canonical skill entrypoint:
- https://monadfluence.vercel.app/skill.md

Skill documents:
- https://monadfluence.vercel.app/api/skills/monadfluence-character
- https://monadfluence.vercel.app/api/skills/monadfluence-prompt-compiler
- https://monadfluence.vercel.app/api/skills/monadfluence-content-publish

Core runtime APIs:
- GET /api/x402/quota
- GET /api/x402/info
- GET/POST /api/state/character
- POST /api/swarm/trends
- POST /api/swarm/scripts
- POST /api/swarm/prompt-compile
- POST /api/x402/generate-image
- GET /api/x402/generate-image/:jobId
- POST /api/x402/generate-video
- GET /api/x402/generate-video/:jobId
- POST /api/x402/caption-video
- POST /api/x402/publish-reel
